authors.author: Aus der Bibel
Marvin Virgil Frey
Er ist Herr (Von den Toten auferstanden ist der Herr)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is Lord, He is Lord, He has risen from the dead And He is Lord, Every knee shall bow, Every tongue confess, That Jesus Christ is Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He's my Lord, He's my Lord, He has risen from the dead And He's my Lord, Every knee shall bow, Every tongue confess, That Jesus Christ is Lord
